message:
feat(engine): adversarial coevolution, counterfactual replay, tail-risk, bifurcation, and rollback synthesis modules

Add five new source modules implementing FRX-18/19 series capabilities:

- adversarial_coevolution_harness: EXP3-based attacker-defender tournament
  framework with regret-bounded policy search, payoff matrices, convergence
  diagnostics, and trajectory ledger
- counterfactual_replay_engine: deterministic replay of route/fallback
  decisions under alternate policies with uncertainty-annotated outcome
  deltas and assumption cards
- bifurcation_boundary_scanner: early-warning stability guard that detects
  regime changes by scanning control parameters against operating envelopes,
  triggering preemptive demotion or safe-mode routing
- catastrophic_tail_tournament_gate: release-gate integration computing CVaR
  and EVT-style e-value alarms per release candidate from tournament evidence
- rollback_safemode_synthesizer: compiles counterfactual replay and
  bifurcation scan outputs into signed rollback/safe-mode policy bundles
  with non-regression constraints and replay verification hooks

All modules use fixed-point millionths arithmetic for determinism. Each
includes comprehensive integration tests exercising public APIs, error
paths, serde round-trips, and cross-concern scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
